title: Apple’s New Siri AI Is Now Gemini
summary: At WWDC 2026, Apple unveiled a rebuilt Siri AI with personal context, screen awareness, Visual Intelligence, writing tools, and cross-device integration across iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch, and Vision Pro. The new Siri reportedly leverages Google Gemini technology but will face delayed EU launch due to regulatory constraints, and Apple shares fell following the announcement.
writeup: The video covers Apple's WWDC 2026 reveal of a rebuilt Siri, reportedly powered by Google Gemini, with personal context, screen awareness, Visual Intelligence, writing tools, and support across iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch, and Vision Pro. It matters because it signals Apple leaning on an external model for its assistant rather than relying solely on in-house systems. Key takeaways: the new Siri spans on-device and cloud integration across Apple's hardware lineup, investors reacted negatively to the news, and the feature faces EU regulatory delays.
